sections.title: Talking to Gertrude again after starting the quest

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Oh yes, before I forget I think there are some people you should meet.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The two ladies you said I could find in Varrock's sewers? Yes, you told me about them.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Oh good. You can go and see them in the sewers whenever you're not too busy. Now, is there anything else I can do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Oh yes, before I forget - are you still in the adventuring business?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am! Do you have another quest for me?

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Well, I don't - but I happen to know someone who might!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who's that then?

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Well, there are these two ladies who are looking for adventurers with cats.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: They called themselves 'The Ratcatchers'.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ratcatchers, eh? Where would I find them?

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: They told me they generally hang about in the sewers below Varrock. I can't stand it down there, or I'd have looked into this ratcatching business myself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wouldn't have thought you'd have much business down in the sewers.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: I've had to drag Shilop and Wilough out of there more times than I care to count, the little rascals.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: I don't know which is harder, raising kids or cats.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you Gertrude, I'll be sure to have a look for these ratcatchers.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Very well. Is there anything else I can do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll be off. See you another time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting, but I'm a bit busy right now. Maybe another time.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Very well. Is there anything else I can do for you?

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Phingspet
lines.text: And what do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm Gertrude's friend. She said you two were-

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: Ratcatchers?

lines.speaker: Phingspet
lines.text: Oh yes, we know lots about ratcatching.

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: But why should we tell you?

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: These are our trade secrets, you know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: My cat and I are adventurers. If you could teach us a trick or two I bet it would come in handy!

lines.speaker: Phingspet
lines.text: We'll have to confer.

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: What do you think?

lines.speaker: Phingspet
lines.text: I don't think cats even do tricks.

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: Don't be stupid! Can we teach [him/her/them] ratcatching?

lines.speaker: Phingspet
lines.text: I don't know. Seems a bit weird.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can hear you, you know!

lines.speaker: Phingspet
lines.text: We'll set [him/her/them] a task, see how it goes.

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: Great idea!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I already have this medal that Gertrude gave me for catching 100 rats. Will that do?

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: That's no good. How do we know you didn't buy it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You could trust me?

lines.speaker: Phingspet
lines.text: Boo! Bring on the task!

lines.speaker: Phingspet
lines.text: Right, if you catch 8 ratsies with your cat...

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: We'll tell you what we know.

lines.speaker: Phingspet
lines.text: Sound fair?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I suppose so. How will you know that I've completed your task?

lines.speaker: Phingspet
lines.text: We'll smell your cat, of course!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Um... alright.

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: Great! Let's have a sniff then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you alright, cat?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: I'll live.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Miaoww!

lines.speaker: Phingspet
lines.text: Yup. Definitely a cat!

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: A real pongy one, too.

lines.speaker: Phingspet
lines.text: Go on then, go splat them ratsies!

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: Splat 'em! Squash 'em!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er, will do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: [He's/She's/They're] back!

lines.speaker: Phingspet
lines.text: [Has he/Has she/Have they] splatted some ratsies?

lines.speaker: Phingspet
lines.text: [He needs/She needs/They need] [amount] more of 'em.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How many, er, 'ratsies' do I have to catch again?

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: 8 ratsies. And your cat has to catch them. Any you get don't count.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Got it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nope!

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: Not even one!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Rubbish!

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: Boo!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Alright, no need to rub it in.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How many, er, 'ratsies' do I have to catch again?

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: 8 ratsies. And your cat has to catch them. Any you get don't count.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Got it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good job puss, we really showed those rats what for.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good job puss, we really showed those rats what for.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: What for what now?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh never mind, it's just a turn of phrase.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Speaking of turning faces, we should tell those funny-smelling humans that we're done.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Suppose so.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Miaow.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well cat, we should tell Grimesquit and Phingspet that we're done.

sections.title: Talking to the sisters without your cat with you

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They're not going to be able to sniff whether I was successful or not unless I bring my cat with me.

sections.title: Talking to the sisters after completing their task

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I splatted the ratsies for you.

lines.speaker: Phingspet
lines.text: Why are you talking like that?

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: Are you making fun of us?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I just thought... won't happen again.

lines.speaker: Phingspet
lines.text: So did you splat them ratsies or what?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er, yes, I did... catch the rats.

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: Haha, nice!

lines.speaker: Phingspet
lines.text: Splat! Splat!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me about ratcatching now?

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: Ha! Seems you already know plenty!

lines.speaker: Phingspet
lines.text: Oh yes, you're a real ratcatching prodigy.

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: Reminds me of us when we were little.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not sure that's a compliment...

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: Well, there's nothing more we can teach you.

lines.speaker: Phingspet
lines.text: Not much at all!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What? So we've just caught all these rats for nothing?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Isn't there anything you can teach me? I caught a lot of rats, you know...

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: Here, have a rat pole.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Um, thanks. What's this for?

lines.speaker: Phingspet
lines.text: You can stick all the ratsies your cat splats on it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh. Just what I wanted.

lines.speaker: Phingspet
lines.text: You're welcome!

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: Now now, keep your shirt on.

lines.speaker: Phingspet
lines.text: We'll send you to Jimmy.

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: Ooh, yes, Jimmy will know how to help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where do I find this... Jimmy?

lines.speaker: Phingspet
lines.text: Jimmy Dazzler hangs out in Ardougne.

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: Ooh, and he is dazzling!

lines.speaker: Phingspet
lines.text: Shut up, Grimesquit!

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: Say hello to Jimmikins from me, won't you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er, sure.

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: Would you look at that!

lines.speaker: Phingspet
lines.text: At what?

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: It's [player name] again!

lines.speaker: Phingspet
lines.text: What do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have another rat pole please?

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: Here you go.

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: Stick the ratsies your cat splats on it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er... will do.

lines.speaker: Phingspet
lines.text: Anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where can I find Jimmy Dazzler again?

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: Didn't you find him in Ardougne?

lines.speaker: Phingspet
lines.text: He's normally in the Flying Horse Inn.

lines.speaker: Grimesquit
lines.text: Give him a kiss from me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I will absolutely not be doing that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Ah, you must be [player name]. I've been expectorating you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You... have?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: I have. The Sisters Grime told me you'd be dropping in.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They said you could teach me a thing or two about ratcatching.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Well, I could, but I need a little more motivation than that.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: I didn't get this far by giving out help freely to every adventurer who came my way.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe I could help you out with something then?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am an adventurer after all.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Ah, that's mincemeat to my ears!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Music?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: No thank you! Your unrefined caterwauling would only draw attention.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: How about I test your ratcatching mettle instead?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Oh, your hands are full. Don't worry, I'll hold onto this map until you can jettison all that rubbish.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Take a good long look at this map.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: A client of mine, a merchant of some repute, is having a sorbet.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A what?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: A soy - a fancy party. Don't interrupt me again.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: This client of mine has a problem, a small furry one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: He'd be better off calling a doctor about that.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: No, you fool! A rat problem.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you want me to go to his place and kill some rats? That sounds easy enough.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Ah, but it's not that simple. Here's your first lesson - we ratcatchers must be discreet.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Our wealthier clients would be ruined if word got out that their fancy mansions were filled with vermin.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I see. So I have to do this covertly?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Precisely!

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Now just in case, I'm going to cast a spell on you that will allow you carry out this task with some element of safety.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you going to cast an invisibility spell on me? That should make it easy.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Not quite. If you're spotted, this spell will teleport you a short distance away and render the last few seconds of your discoverer's memory blank.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's really useful!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where'd you learn that spell, anyway?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: That's a trade secret, m'afraid.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, can you teach me?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Oh my, no. Can you imagine if all the riffraff in Ardougne got wind of this?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: We already have a serious crime problem.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I see.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: But there's plenty more I can teach you about ratcatching... if you complete the task I've set you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any tips for me now?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Of course! Use a cat to catch the rats.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's it?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Don't look a gilt horse in the mouth!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You mean a gift horse?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: I'll gift you no such thing! Now go on, get out of here!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Off I go then...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Ah, you're back. Have you completed your mission?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost the map you gave me. Can I have another?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Oh, your hands are full. Don't worry, I'll hold onto this map until you can jettison all that rubbish.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Here you go, don't lose this one.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Is there anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost the map you gave me. Can I have another?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Haven't I given you the map already? I'm sure I have. I can't afford to be throwing maps around nilly willy.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Is there anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What am I meant to do again?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Read the directions on the map to get to the manor. Once there, eliminate any rats you see with your cat and return to me unseen. Got it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Got it. Thanks for the reminder.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Good, good.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I should have a cat big enough to catch rats with me before I go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't want to go there again. I barely managed to get out the first time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: These directions are from Ardougne. It would be much easier to find the place if I left from there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I'll go there some other time.

sections.title: Reading the directions while at the mansion

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Directions to... here, actually! I'd better hold onto them until I complete Jimmy's task.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: *Whistles*

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: At least I'm not guarding the market.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: 10 green bottles... or was it 9 green bottles?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: 99 green bottles...

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: 508 green bottles...

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Why me?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Fun party...

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: I need a new job.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: I'd kill for a kebab.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Can't wait for the weekend.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: I'm hungry.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Where's that relief guard?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: I wonder if Ali Morissane[sic] is hiring?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: These night shifts just go on and on.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: I'm so bored...

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Halt thief!

lines.speaker: Guest
lines.text: A Thief!

sections.title: Spotted by Ali Morrisane if The Feud has been completed

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good job, Puss, I think that just about wraps things up here.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Aw, really? I was enjoying that.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: I'm a cold blooded, claw toting, hitkitty.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A what?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: A callous cat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I knew you had a dark side.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: I have many dark sides.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A what?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Well, we had better get out of here. Let's do it quietly.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Ah [player name], aren't you just the ticket?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: A job well done. Confabulations!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, the job really is done!

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Never mind. So you'll teach me all about ratcatching now?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Of course! If you want to learn about ratcatching, get yourself to the Rat Pits here in Ardougne.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: It's a great place for training kittens. Just look at Bones here!

lines.speaker: Bones
lines.text: I think of nothing but murder all day!

lines.speaker: Bones
lines.text: Mew!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: He does look good at catching rats. But what about older cats?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Ah, well. My good friend Hooknosed Jack can tell you all about those.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: He has the oldest cat I've ever seen.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where do I find this... Hooknosed Jack?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: He hangs around in a rather unfashionable part of Varrock. He likes a good scrap, does Jack.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: I'll tell him to look out for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me more about the Rat Pits?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: The pits lie below this very pub.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: See that ladder there? That's the way in.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What goes on in these pits then?

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: I'd have thought it was self-exploratory. Here, have a manual.

lines.speaker: Jimmy Dazzler
lines.text: Here, take this, you might find it useful.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello! Are you Hooknosed Jack?

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: Depends who's asking. What do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Jimmy Dazzler sent me. He said you could help train my grown cat to catch rats.

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: I expect he wants me to do that for free, does he?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I'm an adventurer. There must be something I can do for you in return.

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: Forget it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: I'm too busy to babysit you and your moggy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, come on.

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: No, really. Me and Pox have too much going on.

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: We've got a big job to finish today, I can't teach you how to catch rats on top of that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I could be your apprentice! I've already got hands-on experience.

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: Oh yes? What sort of experience?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I helped the Grime Sisters catch loads of rats in the sewers, and I cleared out a whole mansion in Ardougne for Jimmy Dazzler.

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: I bet you did. Typical Jimmy, leaving the hard work to everyone else.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what do you say? Can me and my cat help you out?

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: Oh, alright then. But you'd better not give me or Pox any trouble!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: We won't!

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: I'd better not regret this...

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: Right, your first task is to clear out a warehouse south of here.

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: All you need to do is poison the rat holes with some bait. Can you handle that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think so. Will any type of poison do?

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: Are you daft? You need rat poison to kill rats!

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: If you can't mix a batch up for yourself, there's sure to be some lying around here somewhere.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would this stuff do?

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: It certainly will! There's hope for you yet.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How would I mix my own rat poison?

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: Honestly, kids these days...

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: Just bring me the base ingredients, and I'll mix it up for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are the ingredients then?

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: Get me some Kwuarm, some red spider eggs, and a vial.

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: Right, to poison the rats you'll need some tasty bait.

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: They love a bit of cheese, so pour some poison on that and then leave it in the rat holes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, can do.

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: Report back to me when you're done.

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: And no slacking!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Um... let me think about this one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No! That would be stupid.

sections.title: Putting anything but cheese in the rat hole

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Putting random things in rat holes isn't my idea of fun.

sections.title: Putting unpoisoned cheese in the rat hole

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you make me some rat poison?

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: Have you got the ingredients for me yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, not yet. What do I need again?

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: Get some Kwuarm, Red Spider Eggs and an empty vial. Bring them to me, and I'll make a batch of rat poison for you.

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: Do you see that bar to the south of here? Well, behind that is the warehouse. The rats are on the first floor.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've finished the job. Now will you teach me more about ratcatching?

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: You're pulling my leg!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who, me?

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: Yes, you! You think I can't tell you're lying? Now get back to the warehouse and kill those rats!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well that's one less rat hole. I had better finish the job off quick before they start to reproduce again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm, that should do the trick. Those rats should soon die off.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I poisoned the rats in the warehouse! Do you have time to teach me about grown cats yet?

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: Not right now, [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you serious? I've gone and done a job for you, the least you could do is say thanks.

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: Can't you see I'm upset?

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: It's my cat, Pox. She's half dead, bless her.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh no! What happened?

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: They found her at the warehouse you were working at. She must have eaten some of the rats you poisoned.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh no...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I help? I feel somewhat responsible...

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: That's kind of you, [player name].

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: There's an apothecary here in town, he could help. Tell him that the poison was made from red spiders eggs and kwuarm. He should know what to do. Go quickly.

sections.title: Using any item on the poisoned rat holes

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Putting things in poisoned rat holes isn't my idea of fun.

sections.title: Talking to Pox while they are poisoned

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi cat!

sections.title: Talking to the Apothecary again without all the ingredients

lines.speaker: Apothecary
lines.text: I am the Apothecary. I brew potions. Do you need anything specific?

lines.speaker: Apothecary
lines.text: You need to get a Bucket of Milk, Ground Unicorn Horn and some Marrentill before I can create a cat anti-poison potion for you.

lines.speaker: Apothecary
lines.text: You need to get some Ground Unicorn Horn and Marrentill before we can proceed.

lines.speaker: Apothecary
lines.text: You need to get a Bucket of Milk and some Marrentill before we can proceed.

lines.speaker: Apothecary
lines.text: You need to get a Bucket of Milk and some Ground Unicorn Horn before we can proceed.

lines.speaker: Apothecary
lines.text: You need to get some Ground Unicorn Horn before we can proceed.

lines.speaker: Apothecary
lines.text: You need to get some Marrentill before we can proceed.

lines.speaker: Apothecary
lines.text: You need to get a Bucket of Milk before we can proceed.

sections.title: Talking to the Apothecary after he has given the player cat antipoison

lines.speaker: Apothecary
lines.text: I am the Apothecary. I brew potions. Do you need anything specific?

lines.speaker: Apothecary
lines.text: What are you hanging around here for? You've got the anti-poison, so go give it to Jack. Quickly!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you make me another cat anti-poison potion?

lines.speaker: Apothecary
lines.text: No problem! I'll need some more ingredients though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh... I don't have all the ingredients on me at the moment.

lines.speaker: Apothecary
lines.text: Well hurry up and fetch them! Poor Pox is in serious danger. That poison she consumed was incredibly strong.

lines.speaker: Apothecary
lines.text: I am the Apothecary. I brew potions. Do you need anything specific?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need to talk to you about cats.

lines.speaker: Apothecary
lines.text: As I said before, I'm the apothecary not the vet.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, do you know anything about poisons?

lines.speaker: Apothecary
lines.text: Of course I do! What kind of poison do you need help with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How about rat poisons and anti-posisons for cats?

lines.speaker: Apothecary
lines.text: I think I can help you with that. What happened?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay. Hooknosed Jack's cat, Pox, ate some rats which were poisoned with a Kwuarm and Red Spider Egg based concoction.

lines.speaker: Apothecary
lines.text: Not Pox! I remember when she was a kitten... hang on, I have no time for dilly dallying.

lines.speaker: Apothecary
lines.text: I know just the thing to help Pox out.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great! How can I help?

lines.speaker: Apothecary
lines.text: I need a Bucket of Milk, some Ground Unicorn Horn, and a bit of Marrentill.

lines.speaker: Apothecary
lines.text: Quick, get this to Jack. If I know him, he wouldn't have sent someone else to do this if Pox wasn't seriously ill.

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: Have you got the anti-poison?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I knew I forgot something. I'll be back in a second.

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: Just hurry up, will you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I've got it right here.

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: Thank you [player name]. Thank you so much.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No worries there, I'd be sorry to see poor Pox come to harm.

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: Well, thanks to you, she'll live to see another day.

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: I have to have a word with you about the job you did in the warehouse.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I did a good job, didn't I?

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: The thing is, you didn't quite finish the warehouse job.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wait, but I poisoned all the rat holes just like you said.

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: You did, but one rat survived... the biggest, nastiest one of the lot.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I'm not scared of big, nasty rats.

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: I hope not, because someone's got to get rid of it, and me and Pox are out of action.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't worry - we're on the case.

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: I really underestimated you, [player name]. Best of luck.

sections.title: Talking to Jack before killing the king rat

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: Have you killed the King Rat yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Umm... no.

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: Look, you did me and Pox a big favour, but that's not an excuse to slack off.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How's Pox doing anyway?

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: Oh, she's doing alright...

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: Oi! You can't distract me like that. Get on with you, and get rid of that rat!

sections.title: Using the cat on the hole in wall

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Be careful in there, cat!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Go get that nasty rat, don't hold back!

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Hisss!

lines.speaker: King rat
lines.text: Pfssst!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Go get him, kitty!

sections.title: If your cat reaches 1 health during the fight after telling it to be careful
If your cat dies to the king rat
Using fish on the wall to heal the cat

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Miaooow!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Come here, kitty.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Miaooow!

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: They say you've killed the King Rat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Just barely! I was getting worried for my cat, but we pulled through.

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: Your cat?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes! The King Rat was holed up behind a wall, so I had to send my cat in to get it.

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: Well, imagine that. You two must have a great bond. Perhaps I can show you a thing or two after all.

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: See that manhole over there? Climb down it to enter the Varrock Rat Pits.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you so much! I imagine my cat will learn a lot in there.

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: Just you look after it.

lines.speaker: Hooknosed Jack
lines.text: Say, if you want to know more about the ratcatching business, you should seek out Smokin' Joe in Keldagrim. He was a skilled ratcatcher, back in the day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi! What are you doing?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Isn't it obvious?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, not really.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Bluaaghhaha! Ahem. Sorry.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: I'm trying to smoke these pesky rats out. Ahem-hem-hem.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you alright?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: I'll - ugh - I'll be fine, youngin'. My lungs just aren't up for ratcatchin' like they used to be.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Bluaaghhaha!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ratcatching, you say?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I could help you. I'm young-ish and my lungs are doing fine so far.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: That's-

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Bluaaaghhaha!

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: -kind of you, youngin'.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's up with your lungs anyway?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Years of blowin' smoke into rat holes, youngin'.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh dear. Speaking of rats...

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: You offered to help me out.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's right! Me and my cat have been learning from the best of the best.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The Sisters Grime, Jimmy Dazzler, Hooknosed Jack...

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Blimey, that's my old crew! How are they all?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Better now that I've helped them out, I think.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Now, how should I get rid of these rats?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: That's sim-

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: bluaaghhaha...

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: simple. Take this pot, light the contents, and blow the smoke into the hole.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er... this pot specifically?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Aye, this pot. What's wrong with it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's a bit... phlegmy...

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: You'd better make your own then. A-hem-hem.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Just take a simple pot and stick some ordinary garden weeds in it. Then light the pot and use it on a rat hole.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great. I'll get to it.

sections.title: Talking to Joe again before smoking out the rats
Using a smouldering pot on the rat hole

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm... this isn't working as well as I'd hoped.

sections.title: Using a smouldering pot on the other side of the rat hole
Smoking out the rat hole again

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Miaaaaow!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hold on, let me equip my Catspeak Amulet so we can talk.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm... this isn't working as well as I'd hoped.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Hey [player name], talk to me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can't you see I'm busy adventuring?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Look, I know you're having fun, but you're doing this all wrong.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well then smarty paws, what should I be doing?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: What we have here is a two cat job.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: You're smoking the rats out, but the smoke clears fast enough for them to run back in before you can catch them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can see that for myself, thanks.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Listen, why don't you leave the rat-catching to the expert? Tell me when you're going to start the fire and I'll run and catch the rats.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great idea. I'll get right to it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey cat, you know the drill, get going!

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Exterminate! Exterminate!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Sorry, I got a little carried away there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey cat, great job. What an ambush!

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Mua-ha-ha!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You know, you really scare me sometimes.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Have you got that job done yet, youngin'?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, not yet.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How's your cough?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Aheeh - hoo.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Better with you helpin' me out, youngin'.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Say, when the job's done, how about I show you to the Rat Pits here in Keldagrim?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That seems a fair deal. But I'd appreciate any pointers you could give me.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: An extra pair of eyes or set of claws can often come in handy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any more straightforward hints?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Bluaaaghhaha! Hurk-!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Never mind, I'll figure it out!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I got the rats.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Well good - ahem - good show.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: I'd better show you our rat pits here in Keldagrim.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great stuff. Let's go.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: They're nice, but the ones they have in Port Sarim are even better.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They have rat pits in Port Sarim?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Oh yes! It's the best place to train your wily cat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wily cats?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Well, I suppose there's no harm tellin' you.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: A-hem!

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Look for 'The Face' in Port Sarim. She'll show you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So where are the Keldagrim rat pits then?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Down the stairs to the basement of the 'Laughing Miner'. Get yourself a drink, too, you've earned it.

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: ...[player name]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Um, yes?

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: Boss wants to talk to you. She's downstairs in the pits.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Got it!

sections.title: Speaking with Felkrash again before ridding the port of rats

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Any luck killing all the rats yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do I have to do again?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Kill all the rats in Port Sarim in one, swift action.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right. I'd better figure out how I'm going to do that...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, The Face said you wanted to speak with me.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Ah, we meet at last. My fellow ratcatchers tell me you're quite the talent.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I can't take all the credit, I've had more than a little help from my cat.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Ah, modesty. A trait seldom displayed by adventurers like yourself.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Too many more like you and I'll lose half of my business.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why's that?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Epic poems aren't usually commissioned by the shy and retiring.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Smokin' Joe said that you know lots about training wily cats.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: I do indeed. In fact, that's why I wanted to talk to you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you'll show me how to turn my cat into a wily cat?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Ah, ah, ah - not so fast.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let me guess... you want me to catch some rats for you first?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Bingo.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Alright then, what's the job?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Nothing too difficult. Just rid the port of every single rat... at once.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: At once?!

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Yep. I expect to see all the rats in Port Sarim dead in one, decisive action.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you serious?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Deadly!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So why do you want all the rats wiped out at once?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: I want to write a new poem.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: About me?! How flattering.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: No, silly. A poem about the art of ratcatching.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Poetry might be my bread and butter, but catching rats is my real passion.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Couldn't you just use some 'creative license' instead?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not to disappoint you, but this task might be beyond my capabilities...

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Don't be so hard on yourself!

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Besides, it's not difficult. I myself performed the very same feat just a few years ago.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You did? How?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Ha! Nice try. You'll have to figure that out for yourself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It was worth a shot...

sections.title: Returning to The Face for ideas

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: Oh it's you again.

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: Felkrash told me of the task she set you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, er, really?

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: I shouldn't have told you that story. Shame on you for coaxing it out of me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If it makes you feel better, I lie to a lot of people.

sections.title: Speaking to Felkrash after hearing The Face's story

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I know how to carry out your task.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Oh yes? Has The Face been telling tales again?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh no, she didn't say a word.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Really, she didn't.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: Oh. It's you again.

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: Have you spoken with the boss yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes. Actually, I wanted to ask you about the task she gave me...

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: Stop right there. You'll get not hints out of me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You know, you're very pretty...

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: Ha! That's a good one.

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: I hope you're better at ratcatching than lying.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's a powerful-looking cat you have there.

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: Bellemorde? Beautiful, isn't she?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er... yes.

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: I've had her since she was a kitten. Felkrash trained her for me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh really? Does she know any cool tricks?

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: Oh yes! There was this one time she helped Felkrash wipe out all the rats in town by -

lines.speaker: Bellemorde
lines.text: Hiss!

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: Oh, I see. Nice try, [player name], but you'll have to be cleverer than that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Almost had it...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I just don't think Felkrash was that impressive.

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: All the other ratcatchers I've met had loads of tricks to show me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: In comparison, Felkrash was just... disappointing.

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: How dare you! Felkrash is the greatest ratcatcher Gielinor's ever seen!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh yeah? What's the most impressive thing she's done then?

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: I'll have you know she once killed all the rats in Port Sarim with just one attack!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't know. That just sounds like one of her stories.

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: It's true! I saw it happen. She used a magic flute to charm the rats into the sea!

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: Wait... I uh, I shouldn't have said that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't worry, I won't tell Felkrash you snitched.

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: You'd better not!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They charm snakes over in Pollnivneach... maybe they charm rats, too?

sections.title: Using a coin on the snake charmer's money pot

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want to talk to you about animal charming.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you help me learn how to charm animals?

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: That depends. How much are you willing to pay?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not paying you again!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Listen, do you know someone called Felkrash?

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: Felkrash the Bard? Pah!

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: I taught her all she knows about animal charming, and then she used my knowledge to kill!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's wrong with killing rats? That is her job, after all.

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: Music should never be used to kill.

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: When I first met Felkrash we sang about love, not war.

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: Oh, things were a lot better in those days.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So there's nothing I could do to get you teach me how to charm rats?

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: Absolutely nothing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What if I offered you a drink?

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: I'd say thank you very much and take it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But would you teach me?

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: That might depend on how the drink tasted.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what's your favourite drink then?

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: Beer, just plain old beer.

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: Ahh, that hit the spot.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So will you teach me now?

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: Nope.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But... but...

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: Sorry!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have any beer on me.

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: That's too bad!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What if I offered you some food?

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: I'd say I wasn't hungry.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What if I offered you some money?

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: Now we're talking.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How much money are we talking about?

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: I'll teach you for [amount] coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have that much money!

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: You're a resourceful looking adventurer. I'm sure you'll figure something out.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll go get more money...

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: I'll be waiting!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What if I offered you 50 coins?

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: Yes... that sounds fair...

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: It's not that difficult. Here, take these.

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: I'd give you a flute to go with it, but I see you've kept the last one I gave you!

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: Study the sheet music carefully. Playing it on the flute will draw rats to you like flies to a bucket of camel dung.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll go get more money...

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: I'll be waiting!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Forget about it. I don't care that much.

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: What? I'm offering something invaluable, and you'll quibble over a couple of coins?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'm done here.

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: Good luck finding someone else to help...

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: I'll do it for half the price.

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: I'll do it for quarter the price.

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: I'll...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You'll what?

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: An eighth?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll give you no more than 100 coins.

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: Deal!

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: It's not that difficult. Here, take these.

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: I'd give you a flute to go with it, but I see you've kept the last one I gave you!

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: Study the sheet music carefully. Playing it on the flute will draw rats to you like flies to a bucket of camel dung.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'm done here.

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: Good luck finding someone else to help...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What if I said I'd kill you?

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: If you killed me, you'd never learn my technique.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You've got me there...

sections.title: Reclaiming the snake charm if lost

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want to talk to you about animal charming.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost some of the gear you gave me.

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: What do you need?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost the flute.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost the music.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need a new flute and some music.

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: There you go. Now if you don't mind, I'm busy performing.

sections.title: Talking to the snake charmer again

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want to talk to you about animal charming.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: Yes?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I charm rats again?

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: Do you remember that flute I gave you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: And the music?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: Well, play the music that's on the sheet and that should do the trick.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

sections.title: Attempting to charm the rats at the wrong location

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't think I should play that tune here.

sections.title: Talking to The Face after charming the rats

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: Oh. It's you again.

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: That was an amazing performance! I've only seen one like it... as you know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't worry, Felkrash has no idea how I figured it out.

lines.speaker: The Face
lines.text: And it had better stay that way!

sections.title: Playing the correct song again after charming the rats

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't want to play that tune again - I'll have a pack of rats chasing after me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ha! I did it. Did you see?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: I did indeed! A performance for the ages.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Now that you're a real ratcatcher, I'd be happy to train that cat of yours.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you train my cat to be a wily cat?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: I can only train overgrown cats into wily cats.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: A heroic cat like yours needs a heroic name, don't you think?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Shall we rename it?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Hey [player name], you finally got around to naming me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry I took so long, [Cat name], it took a while to come up with a name for you.
